activities_projects.title: Description of the Kingdom
activities_projects.objective: Understand the setting of the story
steps: Read the opening section of the lesson
Write 5 sentences describing the Kingdom of Fools
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the setting and atmosphere of the story

activities_projects.title: Character Sketch of the King
activities_projects.objective: Analyse the character of the king
steps: Identify actions and decisions made by the king
Write 5–6 lines describing his personality

activities_projects.title: Disciple’s Decision
steps: Identify why the disciple stayed in the kingdom
Explain the consequences of his decision
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands cause and effect in the story

activities_projects.title: Court Case Analysis
steps: List the people blamed for the thief’s death
Explain why each person was blamed
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the chain of events in the trial

activities_projects.title: Role of the Guru
activities_projects.objective: Understand the wisdom of the guru
steps: Read the section where the guru returns
Write 4–5 lines about how he saved the disciple

activities_projects.title: Theme of Justice
activities_projects.objective: Understand the theme of justice in the story
steps: Describe how justice was handled in the kingdom
Explain why it was unfair

activities_projects.title: Importance of Wisdom
steps: Write how the guru used wisdom to solve the problem
Explain why wisdom is important

activities_projects.title: Story Summary
steps: Read the whole lesson
Write a summary in about 6–8 sentences
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the main events of the story

activities_projects.title: Character Comparison
activities_projects.objective: Compare the guru and the disciple
steps: Write two differences between the guru and disciple
Explain their behaviour in the story

activities_projects.title: Ending of the Story
steps: Explain how the king and minister died
Describe how the kingdom changed afterwards
